top_signals.title: Philippines rejects Chinese academics’ sovereignty claims to Batanes Islands
top_signals.summary: The islands are located fewer than 200 kilometers from self-ruled Taiwan and have hosted joint Philippine-U.S. military drills as recently as April.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
